candidate.completion: invent a typo so I can finally say someone texted me first.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please invent a typo so I can finally say someone texted me first.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and exact: a typo becomes counterfeit proof of being wanted. The closing idea lands with real human truth and a good pivot, but the sentence is a little long and less aphoristic than its best concept.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
